name: Starving Tirade

abilities.name: Gruesome Feast
abilities.text: After this model kills an enemy model, it may drain a (t) or discard a card to replace this crew card with Feasting Tirade.

abilities.name: Feed on the Faithful
abilities.text: After a Hunger token is removed from this model, this model heals 1.

abilities.name: Hungry March
abilities.text: When this model declares the Walk action, it may gain a Hunger token to treat that action as a (t) action.

extraction_notes: Faction not clearly visible on this crew card
Starving Tirade appears to be part of a multi-state crew card system that can be replaced with 'Feasting Tirade'
